CustomField.formula: OR( AND( BLANKVALUE(Effective_Final_Discount_Approver__c, Final_Discount_Approver__c) = Sales_Manager__c, ISPICKVAL(Sales_Manager_Status__c, "Approved") || ISPICKVAL(Sales_Manager_Status__c, "Rejected") ), AND( BLANKVALUE(Effective_Final_Discount_Approver__c, Final_Discount_Approver__c) = Country_Continent_Sales_Head_LOB_Head__c, ISPICKVAL(Country_Continent_Sales_H_LOB_Status__c, "Approved") || ISPICKVAL(Country_Continent_Sales_H_LOB_Status__c, "Rejected") ), AND( BLANKVALUE(Effective_Final_Discount_Approver__c, Final_Discount_Approver__c) = Global_Sales_Head__c, ISPICKVAL(Global_Sales_Head_Status__c, "Approved") || ISPICKVAL(Global_Sales_Head_Status__c, "Rejected") ), AND( BLANKVALUE(Effective_Final_Discount_Approver__c, Final_Discount_Approver__c) = Rotex_Board_Member__c, ISPICKVAL(Rotex_Board_Member_Status__c, "Approved") || ISPICKVAL(Rotex_Board_Member_Status__c, "Rejected") ), AND( BLANKVALUE(Effective_Final_Discount_Approver__c, Final_Discount_Approver__c) = Managing_Director_Country_Manage__c, ISPICKVAL(Managing_Director_Status__c, "Approved") || ISPICKVAL(Managing_Director_Status__c, "Rejected") ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Is Discount gone for approval and got approved.
CustomField.label: Is Discount Approved
